summary: Tested recruitment analytics sequential workflow. Found critical backend processing issues and authentication session problems that prevent full workflow completion.

critical_bugs.issue: Returns 404 Not Found instead of processing data
critical_bugs.impact: Blocks auto-processing after both uploads complete - core workflow broken

critical_bugs.issue: Returns 0 data even after successful uploads
critical_bugs.impact: Dashboard shows empty state despite data being uploaded

flaky_endpoints.symptoms: Sometimes returns data when it shouldn't, sometimes 404 when data exists

ui_bugs.issue: Login session doesn't persist - redirects back to login after navigation

integration_issues.issue: Cannot test full workflow due to auth session expiring

passed_tests: Login API returns 200 with correct credentials
Upload endpoints accept files and return proper validation
Upload Naukri page shows correct UI elements
Workflow state detection (shows 'Naukri Data Already Uploaded')
action_item_for_main_agent: CRITICAL: Fix /api/process-combined endpoint (currently returns 404). This breaks the core sequential workflow. Also investigate authentication session persistence issues. Backend test shows 76.5% success but the failing endpoints are critical for workflow completion.
